channel.title: BYTE on Jodavid Ferreira
channel.description: Recent content in BYTE on Jodavid Ferreira

item.title: Comparison of time of the same function in R
item.description: #Required Packages library(microbenchmark) library(gpuR) #GPU Package ## Number of platforms: 1 ## - platform: NVIDIA Corporation: OpenCL 1.2 CUDA 10.1.152 ## - context device index: 0 ## - GeForce 920M ## checked all devices ## completed initialization ## gpuR 2.0.0 ## ## Attaching package: 'gpuR' ## The following objects are masked from 'package:base': ## ## colnames, pmax, pmin, svd x <- c(1:1000) microbenchmark( mean(x), median(x) ) ## Unit: microseconds ## expr min lq mean median uq max neval cld ## mean(x) 4.153 4.365 5.21019 4.6995 4.8825 27.287 100 a ## median(x) 40.050 41.582 54.02459 42.1795 43.9135 807.199 100 b
